title: Find My Device - Allow Once - IOS [Only This Time - Android] [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Test the "Allow Once" option for Find My Device when a headset is connected, verifying that location and geo icons become visible after granting location permission.
steps: 1. Start the app with headset connected.
5. Tap on back button in upper left corner.
expected: After step 3, a "Allow lens to use your location" window pops up with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't allow". After step 4, Location and Geo icons are visible.
